case_title: KARADSHE & SONS INC VS. BANOU INTERNATIONAL MARKET

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,430.50 FILED BY KARADSHE & SONS INC AS TO DEFENDANT BANOU INTERNATIONAL MARKET ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-27-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-27-2011 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS. PAYMENTS OF $100.00 SHALL BE MADE ON THE 28TH DAY OF EACH MONTH STARTING ON JUL-28-2011 UNTIL AUG-28-2011 WHEN THE FINAL PAYMENT OF $30.50 SHALL BE MADE
REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS; FILED BY DEFENDANT BANOU INTERNATIONAL MARKET

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-27-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-27-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF(S). APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT(S). FARZAD IPAKTCHI INTERPRETS ENGLISH/FARSI - FARSI/ENGLISH ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED (SERVICE FEE $60.00) SERVED MAR-09-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BANOU INTERNATIONAL MARKET

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KARADSHE & SONS INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BANOU INTERNATIONAL MARKET $2,430.50 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,540.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KARADSHE & SONS INC
